nasb.text: Thus all Israel brought up the ark of the covenant of the Lord with shouting, and with sound of the horn, with trumpets, with loud-sounding cymbals, with harps and lyres.

esv.text: So all Israel brought up the ark of the covenant of the Lord with shouting, to the sound of the horn, trumpets, and cymbals, and made loud music on harps and lyres.

cnv.text: 這樣，以色列人歡呼、吹角、吹號、敲鈸、鼓瑟、彈琴，大聲奏樂，把耶和華的約櫃抬了上來。

ccb.text: 以色列人把耶和华的约柜抬了上来，一路上欢呼吹角、鸣号、敲钹、鼓瑟、弹琴，大声奏乐。
